'''madhowo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:foamflower|foamflower]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-dh-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:foamflower|foamflower]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| madhowo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:mædheweth|mædheweth]] || [[word:mædhewej|mædhewej]] || [[word:mædhewesh|mædhewesh]] || [[word:mædhewe|mædhewe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:madhodhowoth|madhodhowoth]] || [[word:madhodhowoj|madhodhowoj]] || [[word:madhodhowosh|madhodhowosh]] || [[word:madhodhowo|madhodhowo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:madhowoth|madhowoth]] || [[word:madhowoj|madhowoj]] || [[word:madhowosh|madhowosh]] || [[word:madhowo|madhowo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:madhofwoth|madhofwoth]] || [[word:madhofwoj|madhofwoj]] || [[word:madhofwosh|madhofwosh]] || [[word:madhofwof|madhofwof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:madhowotho|madhowotho]] || [[word:madhowojo|madhowojo]] || [[word:madhowosho|madhowosho]] || [[word:madhowoko|madhowoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:madhowoth|madhowoth]] || [[word:madhowoj|madhowoj]] || [[word:madhowosh|madhowosh]] || [[word:madhowo|madhowo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:madhowothol|madhowothol]] || [[word:madhowojol|madhowojol]] || [[word:madhowoshol|madhowoshol]] || [[word:madhowokol|madhowokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:madhowothotho|madhowothotho]] || [[word:madhowojojo|madhowojojo]] || [[word:madhowoshosho|madhowoshosho]] || [[word:madhowoko|madhowoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:madhowothon|madhowothon]] || [[word:madhowojon|madhowojon]] || [[word:madhowoshon|madhowoshon]] || [[word:madhowokon|madhowokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:madhowothoro|madhowothoro]] || [[word:madhowojoro|madhowojoro]] || [[word:madhowoshoro|madhowoshoro]] || [[word:madhowokoro|madhowokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|27df60f}}
